meta.title: Octava Ingeniería | Electrical Installations & Renewable Energy — Medellín, Colombia
meta.description: RETIE-certified electrical engineering in Medellín and Antioquia: installations, solar and wind power, EV chargers, CCTV and advanced diagnostics for homes, buildings and industry.
meta.keywords: electrical engineering Medellin, electrical installations Antioquia, solar panels Medellin, EV chargers condominium, RETIE Colombia, electrical maintenance, renewable energy Antioquia, CCTV Medellin
meta.ogTitle: Octava Ingeniería | Energy that transforms, solutions that last
meta.ogDescription: Certified electrical engineering for homes, buildings and industry in Antioquia. RETIE, solar, wind, EV chargers, CCTV and advanced diagnostics.

hero.eyebrow: Certified electrical engineering · Medellín, Antioquia, Colombia
hero.subtitle: Design, installation, legalization and maintenance of electrical systems for homes, buildings, industry and infrastructure across Antioquia and Colombia.
hero.ctaPrimary: Talk to one of our specialists
hero.imageAlt: Photovoltaic solar panels installed on a rooftop with the Antioquia mountain range in the background — solar energy project by Octava Ingeniería

services.title: Comprehensive solutions, backed by certified projects
services.subtitle: We work with residential, commercial and industrial clients, from design through legalization. Flip each card to see a real project behind the service.

items.title: Electrical design & installations
items.desc: New builds or retrofits with wiring, panels and efficient lighting, backed by drawings, load calculations and legalization with the grid operator.
items: Homes, buildings and condominiums, industrial plants, rural infrastructure
RETIE certification included in every project
items.backAlt: Residential interior with certified lighting installation by Octava Ingeniería
items.backResult: Common areas and apartments fully lit

items.title: Electrical studies & risk mitigation
items.desc: Identifying and solving electrical risks through load and capacity studies, thermography, electrical testing and power quality analysis.
items: FLIR thermography: hot spots and load imbalances
Power quality analysis: THD, flicker, power factor
Preventive maintenance and solar system upkeep
items.backAlt: FLIR thermal camera detecting hot spots on an electrical panel during a diagnostic by Octava Ingeniería

items.title: RETIE technical & regulatory advisory
items.desc: Support with legalization, RETIE audits and permitting, for certified installations and projects approved without setbacks.
items.backAlt: Industrial electrical panel with copper connections reviewed during a technical audit by Octava Ingeniería

items.title: Renewable energy — Solar & wind
items.desc: Solar and wind systems tailored to each need (home, building or industry), with precise design, rural integration and full legalization.
items: Wind systems for rural and remote areas
On-grid and off-grid hybrid systems with battery storage
items.backAlt: Photovoltaic solar panels installed on the roof of a single-family home in El Retiro, Antioquia
items.backResult: 80% reduction in the utility bill amount

items.title: Electric vehicle chargers
items.desc: Installation and commissioning of EV charging points in condominiums, commercial parking lots and industrial plants. A complete technical, legal and billing solution.
items.backAlt: Nighttime aerial view of a residential complex with parking ready for electric vehicle chargers in Envigado, Antioquia
backBullets: Smart charging: remote monitoring and control
Legalization and individual metering per user

items.title: Telecom, CCTV & fire detection
items.desc: Design and installation of networks, closed-circuit television and fire detection, integrated for communication, security and complete protection.
items: Fire detection and alarm (smoke and heat sensors)
Access control and virtual reception with facial recognition

nosotros.title: Reasons to trust us with your project
nosotros.imageAlt: Octava Ingeniería engineer performing a technical diagnostic with a thermal camera and clamp meter

items.title: Certified technical expertise
items.desc: RETIE-certified engineering, drawings, load calculations and legalization with the grid operator. No improvising.

items.title: Innovation & a forward-looking vision
items.desc: Solar, wind, EV chargers, advanced diagnostics and telecommunications. Solutions built for tomorrow.

items.title: Results-driven pragmatism
items.desc: For every challenge, we develop multiple solution alternatives with scope and budget clearly defined from the start, so clients can choose the option that best fits their project's goals.

items.label: Regional & national coverage
items.sub: Valle de Aburrá & Valle de San Nicolás
